title: Migrate Bubble Tea to v2 (full guide path)
description:
Source: docs/migration_tasks_for_bubbletea_v2.md

Scope:
- Full Bubble Tea v2 migration in bb-project.
- Import path/module migration, View contract changes, key-event migration, tests/docs updates, final guide-complete sweep.

Must preserve behavior:
- Full-screen UX in `bb config` and `bb fix`
- unsaved-change quit filter
- key handling (`space`, `alt+v`, `ctrl+c`)
acceptance_criteria: All phase tasks complete, verification gate green, no stale v1 APIs/imports.

title: Bubble Tea Phase 1: module/import migration
description:
Phase 1: Dependency and import-path migration.

Tasks:
- Update `go.mod` dependencies:
  - `github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea` -> `charm.land/bubbletea/v2`
  - `github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss` -> `charm.land/lipgloss/v2`
  - `github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles` -> `charm.land/bubbles/v2`
- Run `go mod tidy`.
- Update imports in:
  - `internal/app/config_wizard.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_wizard.go`
  - `internal/app/ui_badge.go`
  - `internal/app/config_wizard_test.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_test.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_stage_stash_summary_test.go`

Dependency rationale:
- Must be first; later phases depend on v2 types (`tea.View`, `tea.KeyPressMsg`).
acceptance_criteria: Repo compiles with charm.land/*/v2 imports in target files and tidy'd module files.

title: Bubble Tea Phase 2: View() tea.View + alt-screen fields
description:
Phase 2: Model/View contract + alt-screen migration.

Tasks:
- Convert view signatures:
  - `configWizardModel.View` -> `func (...) View() tea.View`
  - `fixTUIBootModel.View` -> `func (...) View() tea.View`
  - `fixTUIModel.View` -> `func (...) View() tea.View`
- Wrap content with `tea.NewView(content)`.
- Remove `tea.WithAltScreen()` from `tea.NewProgram(...)` in:
  - `internal/app/config_wizard.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go`
- Set `v.AltScreen = true` where full-screen UX expected.
- Re-validate `tea.WithFilter(configWizardFilter)` behavior in v2.
acceptance_criteria: View methods return tea.View; alt-screen moved to view fields; filter behavior unchanged.

title: Bubble Tea Phase 3: runtime key events to KeyPressMsg
description:
Phase 3: Key-event runtime migration.

Tasks:
- Replace `tea.KeyMsg` case/type usage with `tea.KeyPressMsg` in runtime update loops.
- Replace `msg.(tea.KeyMsg)` assertions with `msg.(tea.KeyPressMsg)` in config wizard update handlers.
- Update signatures in `internal/app/fix_tui_wizard.go`:
  - `updateWizard(msg tea.KeyPressMsg)`
  - `updateSummary(msg tea.KeyPressMsg)`
  - `isWizardVisualDiffShortcut(msg tea.KeyPressMsg)`
- Replace runtime key-string matches `" "` -> `"space"` in:
  - `internal/app/config_wizard.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_wizard.go`
- Verify `ctrl+c` and `alt+v` still map correctly.

Risk note:
- Press-specific handling required to avoid key-release double-trigger behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime key handling is press-only; space semantics migrated to "space"; shortcuts unchanged.

title: Bubble Tea Phase 4: migrate key tests to v2 message fields
description:
Phase 4: Test migration for key construction/assertions.

Tasks:
- Replace legacy `tea.KeyMsg{Type,Runes,Alt}` in:
  - `internal/app/config_wizard_test.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_test.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_stage_stash_summary_test.go`
- Use `tea.KeyPressMsg` with v2 fields (`Code`, `Text`, `Mod`).
- Migrate space-key tests to `msg.String()=="space"` semantics.
- Migrate alt-modifier tests to `Mod: tea.ModAlt`.
- Add shared test key helper(s) to reduce duplicated literals.
acceptance_criteria: All key-event tests use v2 key messages and pass with preserved behavior.

title: Bubble Tea Phase 5: docs and contributor guidance cleanup
description:
Phase 5: Non-code docs/local guidance alignment.

Tasks:
- Update outdated example in `docs/implemented/003-CONFIG_COMMAND_SPEC.md`:
  - remove `tea.WithAltScreen()` guidance
  - document declarative `View().AltScreen = true` approach
- Update Bubble Tea guidance link/path wording in `AGENTS.md` to v2.
- Grep maintained docs for stale v1 snippets:
  - `github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea`
  - `github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss`

Execution note:
- Can proceed in parallel with test migration once migration direction stable.
acceptance_criteria: Maintained docs/examples reference v2 patterns/import paths; no stale v1 snippets in target docs.

title: Bubble Tea Phase 6: stale API/import sweep
description:
Phase 6: Final guide-completeness sweep.

Tasks:
- Grep for stale APIs/symbols:
  - `tea.KeyMsg`
  - `tea.WithAltScreen`
  - `case " "` in key switches
  - removed commands (`tea.EnterAltScreen`, `tea.ExitAltScreen`, etc.)
  - `tea.Sequentially`, `tea.WindowSize()`
  - v1 import paths for bubbletea/lipgloss/bubbles
- Validate no stale mouse/paste constants introduced.
- Confirm view rendering semantics unchanged (return type change only).
acceptance_criteria: Scan gates clean; no stale v1 symbols/APIs remain in owned code/docs scope.

title: Bubble Tea Phase 7: verification gate
description:
Verification and release gate.

Automated:
- `go test ./internal/app -run 'ConfigWizard|FixTUI' -count=1`
- `go test ./... -count=1`

Manual smoke:
- `bb config`: full-screen behavior, quit filter, space toggles.
- `bb fix`: boot/main alt-screen behavior, wizard/summary navigation, space toggles, `alt+v`, `ctrl+c`, help toggle.

Regression checks:
- visual diff shortcut launches only on intended combo
- no key-release double-trigger
- semantic view output unchanged
acceptance_criteria: All automated/manual checks pass with documented behavior parity.

title: Migrate Bubbles to v2 (component API migration)
description:
Source: docs/migration_tasks_for_bubbles_v2.md

Scope:
- Migrate Bubbles components/API usage to v2 semantics.
- Include key type updates, help/list/viewport API migration, dark/light style wiring, docs and verification.

Components in scope:
- help, key, list, spinner, table, textinput, viewport
acceptance_criteria: All phase tasks complete; API scans clean; interactive behavior preserved.

title: Bubbles Phase A: module/import migration
description:
Phase A: Module + import path migration (global blocker).

Tasks:
- Update module deps in `go.mod`:
  - `github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles` -> `charm.land/bubbles/v2`
  - `github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea` -> `charm.land/bubbletea/v2`
  - `github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss` -> `charm.land/lipgloss/v2`
- Run `go mod tidy`.
- Rewrite imports in:
  - `internal/app/config_wizard.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_wizard.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_test.go`
  - `internal/app/config_wizard_test.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_stage_stash_summary_test.go`
  - `internal/app/ui_badge.go`

Dependency note:
- Must complete first; blocks every downstream component/API migration.
acceptance_criteria: All targeted modules/imports switched to charm.land v2 paths and tidy complete.

title: Bubbles Phase B: key event type migration
description:
Phase B: Key event migration (`tea.KeyMsg` -> `tea.KeyPressMsg`).

Tasks:
- Replace type switches/cases in runtime update loops.
- Replace assertions `msg.(tea.KeyMsg)` -> `msg.(tea.KeyPressMsg)`.
- Update signatures in `internal/app/fix_tui_wizard.go`:
  - `updateWizard`
  - `updateSummary`
  - `isWizardVisualDiffShortcut`
- Update all tests constructing `tea.KeyMsg{...}` to `tea.KeyPressMsg{...}`.
- Re-run keymap behavior tests (`key.Matches(...)`) after conversion.
acceptance_criteria: All key-message handling and test fixtures use tea.KeyPressMsg; keymap behavior preserved.

title: Bubbles Phase F: theme state and background handling
description:
Phase F: Light/dark strategy + Lip Gloss v2 adaptive-color removal.

Tasks:
- Introduce per-model `isDark bool` theme state for interactive models.
- Request background color in `Init()` and handle `tea.BackgroundColorMsg` in `Update(...)`.
- Replace `lipgloss.AdaptiveColor{...}` with explicit light/dark selection pattern using `isDark` (or shared helper).
- Rebuild component styles from `isDark`:
  - `help.DefaultStyles(isDark)`
  - `list.DefaultStyles(isDark)`
  - textinput/table style setup dependent on palette
- Keep tests deterministic:
  - inject `tea.BackgroundColorMsg` before assertions, or
  - set explicit constructor defaults and test both modes.

Critical dependency edge:
- Phase F provides `isDark` input needed by help/list style migration phases.
acceptance_criteria: Theme/background pipeline complete; AdaptiveColor removed; style init keyed by isDark.

title: Bubbles Phase C: help width/style API migration
description:
Phase C: `help` component API migration.

Tasks:
- Replace help width field writes: `model.Width = x` -> `model.SetWidth(x)`.
- Replace help width reads: `model.Width` -> `model.Width()`.
- Ensure copied help models in footer rendering still apply width via setter.
- Apply explicit help styles via `help.DefaultStyles(isDark)` once dark/light context available.
- Update tests asserting help width to `Width()` API.

Hotspots:
- `internal/app/config_wizard.go:469`
- `internal/app/fix_tui.go:405-410,979,1124`
- `internal/app/fix_tui_test.go:469-470`
acceptance_criteria: Help API migrated to setters/getters and explicit style model; tests updated.

title: Bubbles Phase D: list default styles migration
description:
Phase D: `list` component API migration.

Tasks:
- Replace `list.DefaultStyles()` with `list.DefaultStyles(isDark)`.
- Verify removed style fields not used (`FilterPrompt`, `FilterCursor`).
- Verify no `list.NewModel` alias usage.

Hotspot:
- `internal/app/fix_tui.go:1109`
acceptance_criteria: List styles use v2 dark/light signature; no removed list fields/symbols in use.

title: Bubbles Phase E: viewport constructor/field API migration
description:
Phase E: `viewport` component API migration.

Tasks:
- Replace constructor:
  - `viewport.New(width,height)` -> `viewport.New(viewport.WithWidth(width), viewport.WithHeight(height))`
  - or `viewport.New(); SetWidth/SetHeight`
- Replace field writes:
  - `BodyViewport.Width = ...` -> `SetWidth(...)`
  - `BodyViewport.Height = ...` -> `SetHeight(...)`
- Replace field reads:
  - `BodyViewport.Width` -> `Width()`
  - `BodyViewport.Height` -> `Height()`
  - `BodyViewport.YOffset` -> `YOffset()`
- Keep `SetYOffset(...)` usage.
- Update viewport tests to assert via `YOffset()`.

Audit note:
- `HighPerformanceRendering` not used; no migration needed there.
acceptance_criteria: Viewport uses v2 constructor/setter/getter APIs; viewport tests updated.

title: Bubbles Phase G: textinput/table/spinner compatibility pass
description:
Phase G: Textinput/table/spinner sanity pass.

Tasks:
- Confirm no hidden compile errors for these components after module switch.
- Confirm no newly-required style wiring after theme migration.
- Keep explicit checks:
  - textinput removed APIs not used
  - table already uses SetWidth/SetHeight
  - spinner not using removed model constructors or package-level tick APIs
acceptance_criteria: Sanity pass complete with compile/runtime checks for textinput/table/spinner paths.

title: Bubbles Phase H: docs cleanup for v2 model
description:
Phase H: Documentation migration.

Tasks:
- Update `docs/CLI_UX_AND_STYLE_GUIDE.md`:
  - replace AdaptiveColor guidance with v2-compatible dark/light rule
  - add `tea.RequestBackgroundColor` + `tea.BackgroundColorMsg` recommendation
- Update component usage docs:
  - `docs/implemented/003-CONFIG_COMMAND_SPEC.md`
  - `docs/implemented/006-SWITCH_TO_LIST.md`
- Decide/update `AGENTS.md` wording to clarify docs link vs `charm.land/*/v2` code imports.
acceptance_criteria: Docs and guidance updated to v2-compatible component/color patterns.

title: Bubbles verification gate
description:
Verification checklist.

Mechanical scans (clean):
- `rg "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles" internal go.mod`
- `rg "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea|github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss" internal go.mod`
- `rg "\\btea\\.KeyMsg\\b|tea\\.KeyMsg\\{" internal/app`
- `rg "\\.help\\.Width\\b|help\\.Width\\b" internal/app`
- `rg "BodyViewport\\.Width\\b|BodyViewport\\.Height\\b|BodyViewport\\.YOffset\\b|viewport\\.New\\([^)]*,[^)]*\\)" internal/app`
- `rg "lipgloss\\.AdaptiveColor" internal docs`
- `rg "list\\.DefaultStyles\\(\\)" internal/app`

Build/tests:
- `go test ./internal/app -count=1`
- `go test ./... -count=1`

Manual smoke:
- `bb config` resize/help style behavior in light/dark terminals
- `bb fix` list palette, viewport scrolling, help width clamp, `alt+v` shortcut
acceptance_criteria: Mechanical scans, tests, and manual smoke checks pass with no regressions.

title: Migrate Lip Gloss to v2 (explicit color model)
description:
Source: docs/migration_tasks_for_lipgloss_v2.md

Scope:
- Migrate Lip Gloss from v1 to v2 with explicit color/background handling.
- No compat shims in final state unless explicitly justified.

Must preserve behavior:
- readability and palette semantics in light/dark terminals
- borders/chips/pills/help styles across interactive flows
acceptance_criteria: Color system migrated with explicit background-aware style strategy; tests/smoke checks pass.

title: Lip Gloss Phase 1: module/import migration
description:
Phase 1: Module/dependency + import migration.

Tasks:
- Replace `go.mod` dep:
  - `github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss v1.1.0`
  - -> `charm.land/lipgloss/v2 v2.0.0`
- Update imports in:
  - `internal/app/config_wizard.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_wizard.go`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_test.go`
  - `internal/app/ui_badge.go`
- Run `go mod tidy`; ensure `go.sum` no v1 lines.
- Grep gate: zero `github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss` matches.
acceptance_criteria: Module and imports migrated to charm.land/lipgloss/v2; tidy and grep gate clean.

title: Lip Gloss Phase 2: shared theme/token helper
description:
Phase 2: Introduce shared color-selection helpers.

Tasks:
- Add central helper module (suggested `internal/app/ui_theme.go`).
- Helper API accepts explicit `bgIsDark bool`.
- Return semantic tokens as `color.Color`.
- Use `lipgloss.LightDark(bgIsDark)(light, dark)` for dual-theme tokens.
- Move semantic palette behind helper (`textColor`, `mutedTextColor`, `borderColor`, `accentColor`, etc.).

Local refactor targets:
- `internal/app/config_wizard.go:223-231`
- `internal/app/fix_tui.go:670-806`
- `internal/app/ui_badge.go:24-50`

Dependency note:
- Required before direct `AdaptiveColor` call-site replacement.
acceptance_criteria: Central background-aware token helper exists and used by style construction paths.

title: Lip Gloss Phase 3: remove AdaptiveColor call sites
description:
Phase 3: Replace all `lipgloss.AdaptiveColor` usage.

Tasks:
- Convert all `AdaptiveColor` call sites to explicit token selection from shared helper.
- Files:
  - `internal/app/config_wizard.go` (16 occurrences)
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go` (1 occurrence)
  - `internal/app/fix_tui_wizard.go` (2 occurrences)
  - `internal/app/ui_badge.go` (9 occurrences)
- Migration shape:
  - from direct `Foreground(lipgloss.AdaptiveColor{...})`
  - to semantic token call (e.g. `Foreground(theme.Accent())`).
acceptance_criteria: No lipgloss.AdaptiveColor usage in owned code; semantic tokens drive styles.

title: Lip Gloss Phase 4: replace TerminalColor with color.Color
description:
Phase 4: Remove `TerminalColor` API usage.

Tasks:
- Replace `lipgloss.TerminalColor` with `image/color.Color`.
- Add `import "image/color"` where needed.
- Refactor hotspots:
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go:1751` (`fixSummarySegment.Fg`)
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go:3004` (`renderFixSummaryChip`)
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go:3018` (`renderFixSummaryPill`)
acceptance_criteria: No lipgloss.TerminalColor symbols remain; rendering output unchanged semantically.

title: Lip Gloss Phase 5: background-color event wiring
description:
Phase 5: Bubble Tea background detection integration.

Tasks:
- Request background color during TUI init:
  - `internal/app/config_wizard.go:460`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go:1115`
  - evaluate `fixTUIBootModel.Init` at `internal/app/fix_tui.go:896`
- Handle `tea.BackgroundColorMsg` in update loops and rebuild styles on changes:
  - `internal/app/config_wizard.go:464`
  - `internal/app/fix_tui.go:1119`
- Ensure style re-init centralized (no duplicate constructors).
acceptance_criteria: Dynamic background detection wired; styles recompute correctly on background events.

title: Lip Gloss Phase 6: output profile/downsampling checks
description:
Phase 6: Printing/downsampling verification.

Tasks:
- Confirm Bubble Tea runtime output/downsampling behavior remains adequate with Lip Gloss v2.
- If inadequate, set explicit colorprofile-backed output writer for program output.
- Add/adjust integration assertion(s) for profile-related regressions (truecolor vs downgraded output).

Code contexts:
- `internal/app/config_wizard.go:380` (`tea.NewProgram`)
- `internal/app/fix_tui.go:812` (`tea.NewProgram`)
acceptance_criteria: Output color behavior validated; regression assertion covers profile-sensitive rendering.

title: Lip Gloss Phase 7: tests for v2 color strategy
description:
Phase 7: Test migration and regression coverage.

Tasks:
- Rewrite `TestRenderPanelWithTopTitleUsesPanelTopBorderColor` (`internal/app/fix_tui_test.go:843+`):
  - remove `lipgloss.ColorProfile()` / `lipgloss.SetColorProfile(...)`
  - remove `github.com/muesli/termenv` test dependency if unused
- Keep semantic assertion: top border corner uses accent/top-border color.
- Add/adjust tests validating style token selection for both dark and light backgrounds.
- Cover at least one wizard/list render path in both modes.

Dependency note:
- Finalize after background/theme strategy is stable.
acceptance_criteria: Tests avoid deleted APIs and validate light/dark token behavior for key render paths.

title: Lip Gloss Phase 8: docs update for v2 color model
description:
Phase 8: Documentation updates.

Tasks:
- Update `docs/CLI_UX_AND_STYLE_GUIDE.md:60` from `AdaptiveColor` recommendation to explicit LightDark/background guidance.
- Update `docs/implemented/006-SWITCH_TO_LIST.md:19-24` wording to v2 module path (`charm.land/lipgloss/v2/table`).
- Add migration note in README/changelog if policy expects dependency-upgrade docs.
acceptance_criteria: Docs reflect v2 import path and explicit light/dark color guidance.

title: Lip Gloss Phase 9: verification gate
description:
Phase 9: Verification / exit criteria.

Automated:
- `go test ./internal/app -run 'FixTUI|ConfigWizard' -count=1`
- `go test ./...`
- `go test ./... -race` (if part of standard gate)
- `rg -n "github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss|lipgloss\.AdaptiveColor|lipgloss\.TerminalColor|ColorProfile\(|SetColorProfile\("` returns zero matches outside `references/`

Manual:
- config wizard: colors/readability on light+dark themes
- fix TUI: borders/chips/selected row/wizard badges/summary pills
- no layout regressions at ~80x24 and ~60 columns

Done definition:
- compile/tests green
- no v1 import/API symbols
- docs reflect v2 guidance
- no compat shims left unless justified
acceptance_criteria: All exit criteria satisfied; scans/tests/manual checks pass.
